Computer Science and Engineering Society

events.title: MetaRush
events.name: MMES & IIMSC
events.overview:
MetaRush


MMES & IIMSC


Description

“Meta-Rush” is an adventurous race across multiple routes with exciting checkpoints, where teams unlock clues via QR codes, complete challenges, and compete to finish first with the highest score. It’s a perfect mix of strategy, speed, and fun!


Team Size

Coming Soon...


General Secretary

Harshitha Vanam: 9859781704


Amit: 7597587833
events.rules: Teams race through 6–8 checkpoints, unlocking clues via QR codes. Points (+4 correct, -2 wrong, 0 dares) and time decide the winner.

events.title: MetaDart
events.name: MMES & IIMSC
events.overview:
MetaDart


MMES & IIMSC


Description

“Meta-Dart” is a fun blend of skill and knowledge where each dart throw decides your challenge. The closer you land to the center, the easier the question miss wide, and tougher material-based questions await!


Team Size

Coming Soon...


General Secretary

Abhiram :9059066629
events.rules:
->Players throw a dart at a 12-section material board.
->Closer to center = easier questions; farther = tougher question

3

events.title: OptiMystery
events.name: Electrical engineering society
events.overview:
OptiMystery


Electrical engineering society


Description

In this event one must synchronize strobe lights with rotating objects to reveal and decode hidden patterns for points


Team Size

1


General Secretary

Kruthika:9391783822
events.rules:
->Participants must adjust the strobe frequency carefully,synchronize it with the rotating object, and decode the hidden information.
->The patterns may reveal numbers, letters, or even riddles.The faster you decode, the higher you score!

events.title: Track To Trivia
events.name: Mechanical Engineering Society
events.overview:
Track to Trivia: F1 Quiz


Multi-round Formula 1 Quiz


Description

The F1 Quiz includes online qualifiers, a Grand Prix round (riddles, rapid-fire, strategy, buzzer), and a Final Lap (individual round). Buzzer rules apply in some rounds.


POC:


Vamsi :9392791259
events.rules: Buzzer rounds: first to press answers; wrong answers incur penalties. No audience discussion or use of phones/internet allowed.

events.title: Mechanical Kit Assembly
events.name: Mechanical Enineering Society
events.overview:
Mechanical Kit Assembly


Hands-on assembly contest


Description

Teams are given a dismantled kit and have 45 minutes to assemble it. Points awarded by time and percentage accuracy of assembly.


POC:


Tsheten:9382678789
events.rules: Points awarded based on time taken and percentage assembled accurately. Team with maximum points declared winner.

events.title: OFF Track:RC Car Showdown
events.name: Mechanical Enineering Society
events.overview:
RC Car Showdown


Off Track


Description

Fun races (3 laps each) at B-312, Mechanical Department; 10:00 AM–12:00 PM & 2:00 PM–5:00 PM. Overtaking and pushing are allowed; first to finish wins. No prizes.


Venue & Timings

B-312, Mechanical Department — 10:00 AM–12:00 PM & 2:00 PM–5:00 PM


Contact

Om Prashant Patil : 9579298602 (op23meb0f01@student.nitw.ac.in)
events.rules: Each race has 3 laps on a circuit with turns, intersections, and elevation changes; overtaking and pushing are allowed. Participants complete all laps; the first to finish is the winner. No prizes awarded.

events.title: NEON Cricket
events.name: Mechanical Enineering Society
events.overview:
Neon Cricket


Indoor/Novel Cricket Variant


Description

Each team has 6 players; matches are 6 overs per innings with 1 over per bowler. Runs are awarded by walls hit and bounces. Fun competitive format with specific dismissal rules.


Contact

Vamsi : 9392791259 (av22meb0b15@student.nitw.ac.in)


Tsheten : 9382678789 (tamangtsheten0@gmail.com)
events.rules: Teams of 6 play 6-over innings; outs include bowled, catch, run-out, stumped, LBW, hit-wicket, and one-handed catches.
